name: Ambient Tag Autonomy
blurb: RFID-tagged environments let agents act on physical objects without cameras or cloud queries.

name: Passive Body-Area Network
blurb: Battery-free RFID patches on skin relay biometric data to wearable hubs continuously.

name: Superfluid Geothermal Loop
blurb: Zero-viscosity helium carries geothermal heat to surface turbines with no pipe friction losses.

name: Frictionless Photon Bus
blurb: Superfluid-cooled photonic chips move data at near-zero thermal noise and energy cost.

name: Synthetic Lineage Architect
blurb: Foundation models design optimal cloning protocols for endangered or high-value organisms.

name: Metabolic Digital Twin

name: Intention-Adaptive Prosthetics
blurb: Foundation model interprets residual muscle signals to drive prosthetic limbs with zero calibration.

name: Recursive Self-Curriculum
blurb: A foundation model generates its own training data and fine-tunes itself in a closed loop.

name: Photonic Inference Fabric
blurb: Foundation-model inference runs on photonic chips, cutting latency and power by orders of magnitude.

name: Reactor Operations Copilot

name: Legacy Protocol Resurrection

name: Embodied Goal Delegation

name: Self-Modifying Task Planner

name: Sparse Expert Dispatch

name: Tube Network Control Agent

name: Grid-Reactive Battery Agent

name: Nano-Structured Sodium Anode

name: Neuromorphic AI Coprocessor

name: Emergent Collective Reasoning

name: Photoactive Tissue Scaffold

name: Reactor Fauna Stewardship

name: Expert-Routed Load Dispatch

name: Thermal Gradient Neural Map

name: Deep-Heat Transit Spine

name: Baseload Thermal Buffer

name: Wrist-Worn Document Relay

name: Spike-Driven VR Renderer
